channel.title: Dependency Risk Digest
channel.description: Frontend npm dependency-risk updates with OSV/CVE signals, release notes, breaking changes, security updates, and recommended actions.

item.title: Week 23, 2026 Frontend Dependency Risk Digest
item.description: 24 risky updates, 6 breaking changes, 3 security-relevant releases, OSV/CVE checks, release notes, and recommended actions.

item.title: Week 23, 2026 dependency-risk archive
item.description: Jun 1 - Jun 7: 24 risky updates, 6 breaking changes, 3 security-relevant releases, and 50 tracked frontend npm packages.

item.title: ws 8.21.0 security update
item.description: GitHub release notes mention security or vulnerability fixes. OSV: No OSV match. CVE: No CVE match. Recommended action: Update recommended. Review the GitHub release notes and prioritize this package in the security lane.

item.title: axios 1.16.1 security update
item.description: GitHub release notes mention security or vulnerability fixes. OSV: No OSV match. CVE: No CVE match. Recommended action: Update recommended. Review the GitHub release notes and prioritize this package in the security lane.

item.title: npm-run-all 4.1.5 security update
item.description: GitHub release notes mention security or vulnerability fixes. OSV: No OSV match. CVE: No CVE match. Recommended action: Update recommended. Review the GitHub release notes and prioritize this package in the security lane.

item.title: pnpm 11.5.0 breaking update
item.description: Major version release detected. OSV: No OSV match. CVE: No CVE match. Recommended action: Review changes before updating. Test in staging before merging. GitHub release notes were found for review.

item.title: styled-components 6.4.2 breaking update
item.description: Major version release detected. OSV: No OSV match. CVE: No CVE match. Recommended action: Review changes before updating. Test in staging before merging. GitHub release notes were found for review.
